api.name: recommend_model
api.description: Get the best AI model recommendation for a specific task. Returns ranked models based on quality, speed, or cost optimization with real-time pricing data updated every 4 hours.

task.description: The task type: coding, summarization, creative_writing, data_analysis, math, translation, etc.

api.name: compare_models
api.description: Side-by-side comparison of specific AI models across pricing, capabilities, speed, and quality metrics.

models.description: List of model identifiers to compare (e.g., ['gpt-4o', 'claude-sonnet-4-20250514'])

api.name: get_pricing
api.description: Get real-time pricing for AI models across 30+ providers. Cross-verified every 4 hours against provider APIs.

api.name: estimate_cost
api.description: Estimate the cost of an AI model call based on input/output token counts.

api.name: find_cheapest_capable
api.description: Find the cheapest AI model that meets minimum capability requirements for a given task.

task.description: Task type to find capable models for

api.name: check_price_changes
api.description: Check recent pricing changes across AI models. Useful for monitoring cost trends and catching price drops.

hours.description: How many hours back to check for changes

meta.title: WhichModel
meta.description: Real-time AI model pricing and recommendations. Find the best model for any task at the best price, with cross-verified data updated every 4 hours.
